title: Haikou, Hainan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Haikou, Hainan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Haikou is a city in Hainan with a population of 2,873,000. Capital of Hainan island province, a tropical paradise with year-round warmth, palm-fringed beaches, and a growing free trade port economy.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
